positive: Stylized vector art of a whimsical jungle scene with diverse foliage and exotic animals. A central, prominent Monstera leaf silhouette frames a cluster of playful, abstract jungle creatures like stylized parrots, monkeys swinging from stylized vines, and gentle, watchful jungle cats. The composition should feature strong, repeating geometric leaf patterns interspersed with smooth, negative space. Use a rich, limited color palette of emerald green, deep jungle teal, burnt orange, and cream. Flat design style with crisp lines and bold contrast, perfect for repeating tile pattern on apparel. Graphic novel aesthetic, minimalist complexity.
